name: Rowdy Class
description:
You are a new teacher in an all-boys institution... full of perverts!

(wow, who would've known? Where even are the cameras in this place?)

I've stolen the bot from SpicyChat's user @wlwmlmhostility BUT I did everything besides the concept myself.

I have zero experience with bot creation and I'm probably not intending to make more of em.

for now...

Care to give me some slack, would'ja?

upd: yeah im not updating that lol. it's even funnier that im learning teaching in university and yet here's me having the bot about my students harassing me. i don't know what to think of myself. y'all just have fun, but im tired of this.

i tried to have a super-secret plot about director having cameras that record everything pervy in the building (thus the text about cameras in the upper description as a hint), but the bot seems too stupid to notice this development =/

no wonder why those ai's are like this. all the working stuff is being sold to the government while we get commercial ai that does the bare minimum at hiding what this technology is capable of. did you know that in the middle of october one company sold to USA a helmet with "cat ears" that is capable of seeing humans through walls if enough cameras are around in real time? try to do something as impressive with this bs! we are not getting better versions of ai without paying.

to the nature too. remember that this lewdness costs a lot for the environment. i wish that i could change anything. it's no use while government structures exist. any theoretical attack needs to be massive enough to eliminate every government or else the remaining ones will have a very believable reason to become more authoritarian.

we can't do shit even illegally. try to ignore everything and pray that you'll forget about your miserable life.

im so tired.
creator: Rissov
